lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Nilsal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you heal me? I'm injured.

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The egg that was living at the top of the temple!

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Yes, I noticed the tourist had an egg with him... I didn't realise it had a name...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: We need to do something!

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Well... it's an egg, iknami. If it's broken, then there isn't much you can do about that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not giving up without at least trying first.

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: I see... Well, I don't think I can help you, iknami, but good luck.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing out here?

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: I am Jatziri, one of the seven teoki in service to Ralos. Along with my counterpart from the Sect of Ranul, I am responsible for the temple of Tal Teok.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where is your counterpart?

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Tecuani was unfortunately misled by the traitor Metzli. He joined with her cult along with a few other members of the Sect of Ranul.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry to hear that.

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Don't be. He is no servant of Ranul. He will die the death of a traitor. Once that happens, a more fitting replacement will be chosen.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So for now you're here alone? Does that make the work harder?

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Tal Teok is thankfully one of the easier holy sites to look after. That said, there was a small issue recently when some tourist decided to move in and make it their home.

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: I'll need to handle that at some point, but they don't seem to be causing much trouble, so it is thankfully not a pressing concern.

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: However, the problem resolved itself in an unexpected way when he sadly fell from atop the temple steps. It seems it was a freak accident.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I was actually there to witness it myself. It was horrible.

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Let us hope he can at least now find peace with Ranul.

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Tal Teok is thankfully one of the easier holy sites to look after. However, there is a small issue at the moment in that some tourist has decided to move in and make it their home.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, along with his egg, [egg name], but there's a bit of a problem! [Egg name]'s broken!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better be off.

lines.speaker: Jatziri, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Timoiva, and may the sun light your way.
